subject: Frontiers Newsletter — September 2016
body:
Frontiers

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d73097b963ce9e73319123a422f405f82e7e6c1bd923459ccc216dc659dbfbd2a 

TOP NEWS - SEPTEMBER 2016

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d5900c096dadbcefe0b8d60db6661eb42351f9d5803805f130d627ad7938c3b4a 

The inevitability of free papers

Technologist, an initiative of the EuroTech Universities Alliance, explains how Frontiers and scientists are making headway in challenging the traditional publishing model for research papers.

 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d58d735153078ecbb807a193ed6c8e22a19ae8dad44d681c265f7881a5383eb37 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d58d735153078ecbb807a193ed6c8e22a19ae8dad44d681c265f7881a5383eb37 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d5900c096dadbcefe0b8d60db6661eb42351f9d5803805f130d627ad7938c3b4a 
Read more. 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333dcba7142a0bf02b3dc1d51a22033c79bb2b8b768a4b4fa36be601b6e8141ceba6 

Peer Review Survey

Have you had an article rejected? How many hours of revision did you do before it was accepted? These are questions we are asking researchers around the world in our latest survey.   We'll make the results publicly available upon analysis, with the hope to improve the current understanding of peer-review.

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d58d735153078ecbb807a193ed6c8e22a19ae8dad44d681c265f7881a5383eb37 
Take the 5 minute survey. 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d55ccbaf5b2a7b6d1e5e79f918be89870727ba488a8430db94f60016aaa770ae8 

Mathematics of Computation and Data Science launched

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333dad8c13bf535e3ac0df05a90a7c724bcf98c42790a52c3f5e24e2ded697fc52be 
Frontiers in Applied Mathematics and Statistics  is proud to announce the launch of its newest section - "
http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333dd13bd7d38f73c7b3993cb9e26d34bc0086b98bf3f78673d609af21444f90c876 
Mathematics of Computation and Data Science " led by Specialty Chief Editor, Prof 
http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333dbcbd7278c86f7745ccf78e456ccf68e21e24a761ca66384c459fbfda018eebe8 
Charles Chui , of Stanford University and Hong Kong Baptist University.
 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d00ed643e29f410d9e8cae7a626db923fa55f4c63041990eb550345597367fde8 
Learn more. 

FEATURED RESEARCH TOPICS

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333da861f7232b2ef68ae2674438f58f46deaee0e7e0e0e1d2da6ab5961a44bce190 

To survive climate change, plants must adapt - and fast 

Unlike animals that can migrate to new locations, plants must adapt their biological functions - or perish. 
http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333da3999de7470634d89399fdbe80dd4fea3a6d767f50a24a0beac6816cc774bfeb 
Chelsea Specht , from the University of California at Berkeley, explains how a Research Topic sheds some light on this issue.

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d90818c6309c36ff35c3a00c0dc5b231b61e8114c5881180431301b723acbdece 
Read more. 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d58a88d1c7bc9674a9c1e8e114dcb91178f0652bafa3bf1904fada751af18d044 

Treating babies in the womb for deadly diseases 

Ending pregnancy or exposing mother and baby to extensive treatments that may not work are the difficult choices families face with when diagnosed with serious fetal diseases. 
http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d7d0e6b583957016e1e080910579f09124f6ae1931ea09de042f96fbafbd68bee 
Tippi MacKenzie  talks about her Research Topic that focused on this problem.

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d49d13a3f6b0b0c4f4e6bbdfa234b6705610500938824d0fd461d176e0a0d50e3 
Read more. 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333df8398bb7d090e1b4883284bce908c656787b959f94984eb125d7ac66b558a5f3 

Access the latest research by downloading a Frontiers eBook

Did you know all Frontiers eBooks are free to download? We have over 900 eBooks covering topics which are important to today's scientists and the world. Read all the Frontiers' eBooks published in August.

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d1e5b565d651c4495e3838228a57459184c05457cf2b91b990c85d0d998ebd00d 
Download our latest eBooks here. 

EMPOWERING & SUPPORTING COMMUNITIES

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333dd6102ac2be46313a2adcb8f63f8d8c483aef68729568fdecabae0a9a5173caf1 

New mentorship program for PhD students

Frontiers has launched a mentorship program for PhD students. It will give them the opportunity to curate an article volume around a specific theme within 
http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333dc2154beb161b9d6e9bffcd3b131d0c763324fd0aa6786977af209514b79c6d17 
Frontiers in Ecology and Evolution . 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333dd364fe5d3e3236d0f643bfb70afcf062e392d829c651d570ee1e5f83dbd200a2 
Learn more. 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d714d98c86d68ed2366c5ff528308f50c058ffb558781fa946033b8d8d085c0dc 

New Loop feature boosts peer-review recognition

Peer review takes dedication and hard work.  At Frontiers we have always listed the names of reviewers and editors on published articles. Now we have a new page on Loop that enhances peer review recognition even further by listing the articles you edited/reviewed and played a role in advancing. 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333da6994df177b78a73508de2e5680a39f6214cb3c029634da804ac630e460e22b6 
See your editorial contributions on Loop. 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d543d41000b4b18e5479d6bb02c04dd64d97067c64be28e90520a006420f52fd3 

Help improve peer review

Frontiers is working with 
http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d543d41000b4b18e5479d6bb02c04dd64d97067c64be28e90520a006420f52fd3 
OpenAIRE , a Horizon 2020 project on research and innovation, and we invite you to participate in an anonymous survey on attitudes to Open Peer Review.
 

The survey takes around 15-20 minutes to complete and will remain open until Friday 7th October.

 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d368e809d5e1460c035d2aaa7e93b2b388a6b6a0385b94b0ff5a03a865c32e482 
Take the survey 
http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d9c494f6eb1bc3c35df44179d08ef76d4f62676181e072c9cd620b6da6a6e573e 
. 

 

NEW PODCASTS AND VIDEOS

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333db0ed79017d7e475fbc5588ee0539b8513f7c57b7eacaa6f37d417630fa876d9a 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333db0ed79017d7e475fbc5588ee0539b8513f7c57b7eacaa6f37d417630fa876d9a 
People Behind the Science Podcast: Interview with Dr. Christopher Cederroth 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d9d3698fe71b537f84c23fc7fb580453dac1019bb27624554bee7ea4e48677daf 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d9d3698fe71b537f84c23fc7fb580453dac1019bb27624554bee7ea4e48677daf 
Video: Achieving quality at scale with Frontiers Peer Review 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d173dfa82ea65247f84488de5b325b02ade5d34924573758e9e486554af7bc10f 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333df83226f1d5b233adad0dddbc39469dac956efb7f3e57442df359c9c4e884c3fe 
Frontiers Podcast: Why Peer Review Recognition is important 

RESEARCH IN THE NEWS

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d022e59cb70df3cbbb57971a5ced1aaa6839a3a95fdc151198a2304691fe4f60b 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d022e59cb70df3cbbb57971a5ced1aaa6839a3a95fdc151198a2304691fe4f60b 
Spate of whale entanglements could inform regulations 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333dfd290ebd5172d36a29d11b673346c069bf563d1e781e881b040f33c92307c6d7 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333dfd290ebd5172d36a29d11b673346c069bf563d1e781e881b040f33c92307c6d7 
Childhood insecurity can impair adult emotions 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333da18e6c867970ea5d9036c4d2cce51c946543ce12ba8036b4234975c06fbbd0b6 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333da18e6c867970ea5d9036c4d2cce51c946543ce12ba8036b4234975c06fbbd0b6 
Foraging for food, wolves take more risks than dogs 

SCIENCE HEROES

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d13fc43c5b4c55c2ddaebaaa8ab1627cf74868f2e5ceb616a85260179c2fd93fc 

Don't fear GM crops, they could help solve the sustainability crisis

Modified starch is used by the paper and food industry, and is predicted to be worth $2.89 billion by 2020 in Europe alone. 
http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d8bf46dcd2cbf118735665bc59eb09aa4cbd5fd017ff5e3cfd9f1bbadf02dc18b 
James LLoyd , Assistant Specialty Chief Editor for 
http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333dcac7ececae6c13493dbd64109f674974496b2a7a2f207e7640bd28824e360463 
Plant Biotechnology , has been working on making starch more eco-friendly by manipulating plant genes.

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d3eba5b0a4d54e7dc625eab17d304a67dadceeab70d5a59af76c324c372521766 
Watch video. 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d12b7d59b5b73a6d43551d95ab0ca0cb2ae587e07df17cce62fdddadabfda51ee 

How can we get into the zone?

The idea of "the zone" has been associated with elite athletes, such as Olympians, but what about ordinary people - can we get in the zone? That is what 
http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333de49cbaeb870b2b7565c87dd406539ca9dba738f6d124ae791c97741a1438c39b 
Kath Woodward , Frontiers Specialty Chief Editor for 
http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d8d9b1378f208033941b36d2bcaec1b080dbe8ac2eb88d9b1913a58ba496035b9 
Gender, Sex and Sexuality Studies , and her team are trying to find out.

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=fd0e7ef3336ce4b9c713684c161d2fb1d02d08669c34daa44e4e8236daf221fb6241ab59a2df50f8 
Watch video. 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=fd0e7ef3336ce4b9276b27cab62311c396c3428be88f06b0fa1c02636564b9e7fb91f4e3515b4229 

Just ten weeks of exercise can protect heart

Research shows that ten-weeks of exercise is nearly 100% effective at protecting the heart from potentially lethal changes in heart rhythms. This is just part of 
http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=fd0e7ef3336ce4b93ce50b416677b976933cb565ac5900532b4e645c404d7525a6a0be44b23b0688 
Professor George Billman's , Field Chief Editor for 
http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=fd0e7ef3336ce4b95cc94a22ea573efc3b54eaa35c86479fdf262956b80802840bb75f6c61ed69e5 
Frontiers in Physiology, ventricular fibrillation research.

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=fd0e7ef3336ce4b9ee080972ae43cd8e8a3ee0c5f012d3b2b896a6f7a9ebcc50e9d5396d83c35429 
Watch video. 

YOUNG MINDS

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=fd0e7ef3336ce4b9d1a318d23b430e50938978429c1a2715c2112eca54977040bbf37e4edaef1d5d 

Frontiers for Young Minds coming to the Bay Area Science Festival

How does the brain allow us to mentally wonder off to another time and place? Six student peer reviewers from Frontiers for Young Minds will review scientist presentations and research papers addressing these questions live at the Bay Area Science Festival.


 
http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=fd0e7ef3336ce4b9595961c13ed885673a8eddeb023a8113e99993a7eb78f67112f41e145cde53b0 
Learn more. 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=6d2804ace4c41f29dc7da649670b0fb1ef4f6d444946f75414f142ca94f560b7e1d0949f198c9b45 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d4250aae88dd89100473d3b0876d1db79ca7cc948ff67202ee9d8358e1ae691c3 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333dfdbbbfe242faeb13f35dc94c0f37aa602431fbcdbbe3f2181bce309a268b85be 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d394428766537ea8cbfef279f4ea1c782bcd8b0dd4ed730b6d119ec105856cc1d 

http://click.engage.frontiersin.net/?qs=5b4b94aac3c5333d7a93b7e98e058684835eb36a6b0f9a14428473a446933a2cc6b29aa881be48f6

body_html:
The latest news from Frontiers
TOP NEWS - SEPTEMBER 2016
The inevitability of free papers
Technologist, an initiative of the EuroTech Universities Alliance, explains how Frontiers and scientists are making headway in challenging the traditional publishing model for research papers.

 

Read more.

Peer Review Survey
Have you had an article rejected? How many hours of revision did you do before it was accepted? These are questions we are asking researchers around the world in our latest survey.   We'll make the results publicly available upon analysis, with the hope to improve the current understanding of peer-review.

Take the 5 minute survey.

Mathematics of Computation and Data Science launched
Frontiers in Applied Mathematics and Statistics is proud to announce the launch of its newest section - "Mathematics of Computation and Data Science" led by Specialty Chief Editor, Prof Charles Chui, of Stanford University and Hong Kong Baptist University.

 

Learn more.


FEATURED RESEARCH TOPICS
To survive climate change, plants must adapt - and fast 
Unlike animals that can migrate to new locations, plants must adapt their biological functions - or perish. Chelsea Specht, from the University of California at Berkeley, explains how a Research Topic sheds some light on this issue.

Read more.


Treating babies in the womb for deadly diseases 
Ending pregnancy or exposing mother and baby to extensive treatments that may not work are the difficult choices families face with when diagnosed with serious fetal diseases. Tippi MacKenzie talks about her Research Topic that focused on this problem.

Read more.


Access the latest research by downloading a Frontiers eBook
Did you know all Frontiers eBooks are free to download? We have over 900 eBooks covering topics which are important to today's scientists and the world. Read all the Frontiers' eBooks published in August.

Download our latest eBooks here.


EMPOWERING & SUPPORTING COMMUNITIES

New mentorship program for PhD students
Frontiers has launched a mentorship program for PhD students. It will give them the opportunity to curate an article volume around a specific theme within Frontiers in Ecology and Evolution. 

Learn more.

New Loop feature boosts peer-review recognition
Peer review takes dedication and hard work.  At Frontiers we have always listed the names of reviewers and editors on published articles. Now we have a new page on Loop that enhances peer review recognition even further by listing the articles you edited/reviewed and played a role in advancing. 

See your editorial contributions on Loop.

Help improve peer review
Frontiers is working with OpenAIRE, a Horizon 2020 project on research and innovation, and we invite you to participate in an anonymous survey on attitudes to Open Peer Review.

 

The survey takes around 15-20 minutes to complete and will remain open until Friday 7th October.

 

Take the survey.

  

NEW PODCASTS AND VIDEOS
People Behind the Science Podcast: Interview with Dr. Christopher Cederroth


Video: Achieving quality at scale with Frontiers Peer Review
Frontiers Podcast: Why Peer Review Recognition is important

RESEARCH IN THE NEWS
Spate of whale entanglements could inform regulations


Childhood insecurity can impair adult emotions

Foraging for food, wolves take more risks than dogs
SCIENCE HEROES
Don't fear GM crops, they could help solve the sustainability crisis
Modified starch is used by the paper and food industry, and is predicted to be worth $2.89 billion by 2020 in Europe alone. James LLoyd, Assistant Specialty Chief Editor for  Plant Biotechnology, has been working on making starch more eco-friendly by manipulating plant genes.


Watch video.


How can we get into the zone?
The idea of "the zone" has been associated with elite athletes, such as Olympians, but what about ordinary people - can we get in the zone? That is what Kath Woodward, Frontiers Specialty Chief Editor for  Gender, Sex and Sexuality Studies, and her team are trying to find out.


Watch video.


Just ten weeks of exercise can protect heart
Research shows that ten-weeks of exercise is nearly 100% effective at protecting the heart from potentially lethal changes in heart rhythms. This is just part of Professor George Billman's, Field Chief Editor for  Frontiers in Physiology, ventricular fibrillation research.


Watch video.


YOUNG MINDS
Frontiers for Young Minds coming to the Bay Area Science Festival
How does the brain allow us to mentally wonder off to another time and place? Six student peer reviewers from Frontiers for Young Minds will review scientist presentations and research papers addressing these questions live at the Bay Area Science Festival.

 Learn more.

Your feedback is appreciated at community@frontiersin.org
